first_screen_focus: portfolio value truth and source freshness

portfolio_truth_states.PAPER_LEDGER_CURRENT_VALUES_VERIFIED: fresh simulated PAPER ledger values for display only
portfolio_truth_states.PAPER_LEDGER_LAST_VERIFIED_VALUES_STALE: last verified simulated PAPER ledger values, not runtime proof
